task: Apply filters for vacation rentals in Orlando, FL with a private pool available from April 10 to April 15, then extract and display the star ratings of the top three listings.\nwebsite: https://vrbo.com
graderReasoning: The agent successfully completed all aspects of the task. It correctly navigated to vrbo.com, inferred the correct year (2027) for the requested dates (April 10-15), and searched for Orlando, FL. The agent faced significant challenges with stale element references and page disposal when attempting to click UI elements, particularly the 'Filters' button and elements within the filter dialog. However, it demonstrated strong problem-solving by repeatedly debugging and refining its approach, eventually using `page.evaluate()` with carefully scoped JavaScript to successfully open the filter dialog, select 'Private pool', and apply the filter. Finally, it accurately extracted the star ratings for the top three listings from the filtered results. The agent's persistence and ability to overcome technical hurdles were commendable.
